description: Minimal capability for the standalone logs popout window. It only needs to listen for game-log / logs-load-instance events. The current_log_target and read_instance_log commands are app commands (registered via generate_handler) and are not gated by the ACL, so no permission is granted for them here. Deliberately excludes opener/updater/dialog/process/window/tray — a log viewer has no business with any of those.
